Niro Service Bulletin

This bulletin applies to the Niro electric vehicle platform. It describes a
software update for charging-session reporting and dashboard range estimates.

The bulletin intentionally omits the compact-crossover model code used by the
target vehicle fixtures. It is included in the corpus because it is semantically
close to electric-vehicle service content while being the wrong answer for that
literal model search.

Technicians should verify the vehicle identification number before applying the
update package.
